verse.name: v1
verse.lines: The voice of God, Almighty Warrior, declaring war. Hear His command, You are a chosen generation, a mighty force in the land.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: All of creation now is waiting to see the righteous take their stand; moving out in His anointing, fulfilling God's eternal plan.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Arise, this is the final hour. Arise, you soldiers of the King. Arise, put on your holy armor. No, the gates of hell will not prevail; so arise, the spirit says arise.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: The army of God is now assembled, a people filled with power and might. The time is now no hesitation, take up your swords, stand up and fight.
